positive: A highly stylized celestial tapestry featuring a perfect crescent moon and interconnected constellation patterns. The design should utilize Neo-Art Deco geometric linework, creating strong, clean silhouettes. Composition must be centrally focused and symmetrical, designed to wrap elegantly around a piece of apparel. The color palette is restricted to deep midnight navy blue, matte gold accents, and solid black. The style should mimic intricate stencil art combined with glowing vaporwave neon outlines, printed with high contrast, flat graphical areas, and visible linework, ready for screen printing. Hyper-detailed, graphic design, vector art quality, symmetry, clean lines, cosmic elegance.
